description: Phase 4.10 Task B: PreToolUse regex scan for string-built SQL queries (f-strings, concatenation, %-formatting, .format(), concatenated DELETE). Catches the four classic Python SQL-injection anti-patterns. Parametrised queries (cursor.execute('SELECT ... WHERE id=?', (id,))) are allowed because they contain no interpolation marker. Originally specified with match_glob='*.sh'; here expressed as the matcher grammar the spec loader actually recognises (bash + write/edit_file).
